subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou be confirmed in such deeds as shall conduce to the exaltation of the Cause of God. For instance, should a soul today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله موفق شوی بر اعمالیکه سبب ارتفاع امرالله شود مثلا اگر نفسی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @being a source of light; guidance
